message:
fix(freeze): handle strings, symbols, BigInts in CompressedValue

Add proper type tags for all JavaScript reference types in CV:
- TAG_STR for strings
- TAG_SYMBOL for symbols
- TAG_BIGINT for BigInts
- TAG_FUNC for function bytecode

Fix fromJSValue to compress each type with correct tag.
Fix toJSValue to reconstruct JSValue with correct JS_TAG_*.
Fix decompressPtr to handle all reference types (not just objects).

Also fix force_stack_mode if_false/if_true handlers to pop from vstack
to stay synchronized after opcodes like strict_eq push references.

This fixes the bug where strings inside frozen functions became
undefined (e.g., console.log("x =", x) showed "undefined 5").

Tested: TypeScript scanner, parser, printer all work with frozen code.
